falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: The current runtime tables can disappear entirely without requiring replacement correctness or audit structures.

falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The specific scheduler and lease tables are good deletion candidates, but their underlying responsibilities do not vanish. At-least-once activity semantics and reproducibility needs mean a Convex-side attempt or audit ledger is likely required.
